requirement.title: Create Employee
requirement.description: Admin can add a new employee by entering first name, last name, employee ID and an optional profile photo. Employee ID may be auto-generated or entered manually and must be unique. On save the employee is created and becomes searchable by ID and by name.
requirement.businessFlow: Admin opens Add Employee form → fills fields → uploads photo → saves → sees confirmation → employee searchable
requirement.acceptanceCriteria: Given an authorized admin, when a valid employee is submitted, then the record is created, a success notification is shown, the user is redirected to the employee list, and the new employee is immediately searchable by ID and name.

input.title: Create Employee
input.description: Admin can add a new employee by entering first name, last name, employee ID and an optional profile photo. Employee ID may be auto-generated or entered manually and must be unique. On save the employee is created and becomes searchable by ID and by name.
input.businessFlow: Admin opens Add Employee form → fills fields → uploads photo → saves → sees confirmation → employee searchable
input.acceptanceCriteria: Given an authorized admin, when a valid employee is submitted, then the record is created, a success notification is shown, the user is redirected to the employee list, and the new employee is immediately searchable by ID and name.

obligations: Successfully Create Employee with valid data
Reject a duplicate Unique rule
Enforce maximum length on First Name
Enforce minimum length on First Name
Enforce maximum length on Last Name
Enforce minimum length on Last Name
Enforce maximum length on Name
Enforce minimum length on Name
Neutralize SQL-like input in free-text fields
Neutralize template/command-like input in free-text fields
Neutralize script injection (XSS) in free-text fields
Preserve emoji / multibyte input in free-text fields
Preserve unicode/accented characters in free-text fields
Trim leading/trailing whitespace in free-text fields

requirement.title: User Login
requirement.description: A registered user logs in with a username and password. Valid credentials grant access to the dashboard. Invalid credentials show a generic error. Accounts lock after repeated failures.
requirement.businessFlow: User opens login page → enters credentials → submits → is authenticated and redirected, or sees an error
requirement.acceptanceCriteria: Given a registered user, when correct credentials are entered, then a session is created and the user reaches the dashboard. When credentials are wrong the user stays on the login page with a non-enumerating error.

requirement.title: Cart Checkout
requirement.description: A shopper reviews the cart, enters a shipping address, applies an optional coupon, and pays. On success an order is created, inventory is decremented, and a confirmation is shown and emailed. Payment is by card.
requirement.businessFlow: Cart → shipping address → coupon → payment → order confirmation + email
requirement.acceptanceCriteria: Given a cart with in-stock items and valid payment, when the shopper checks out, then an order is created with the correct total (items + tax + shipping − discount), inventory is decremented, and a confirmation is shown and emailed.

input.acceptanceCriteria: Given a cart with in-stock items and valid payment, when the shopper checks out, then an order is created with the correct total (items + tax + shipping − discount), inventory is decremented, and a confirmation is shown and emailed.

requirement.title: Submit Leave Request
requirement.description: An employee submits a leave request selecting leave type, start date, end date and a reason. The request is validated against the leave balance and sent to the manager for approval. Approval or rejection updates the request status and notifies the employee.
requirement.businessFlow: Employee fills leave form → validates dates and balance → submits → manager approves/rejects → status + notification
requirement.acceptanceCriteria: Given an employee with sufficient balance, when a valid leave request is submitted, then it is created in Pending state, routed to the manager, and on approval the balance is deducted and the employee is notified.

input.title: Submit Leave Request
input.description: An employee submits a leave request selecting leave type, start date, end date and a reason. The request is validated against the leave balance and sent to the manager for approval. Approval or rejection updates the request status and notifies the employee.
input.businessFlow: Employee fills leave form → validates dates and balance → submits → manager approves/rejects → status + notification
input.acceptanceCriteria: Given an employee with sufficient balance, when a valid leave request is submitted, then it is created in Pending state, routed to the manager, and on approval the balance is deducted and the employee is notified.

obligations: Successfully Submit Leave with valid data
Reject malformed Start Date
Reject an out-of-set Status value
Enforce allowed Start Date range

requirement.title: Password Reset
requirement.description: A user requests a password reset by entering their email. A time-limited, single-use reset link is emailed. Using the link, the user sets a new password (with confirmation) that must meet complexity rules. The old password is then invalid.
requirement.businessFlow: User requests reset → email with token link → opens link → sets new password → confirms → logs in with new password
requirement.acceptanceCriteria: Given a registered email, when a reset is requested, then a single-use, time-limited link is emailed without revealing whether the account exists; using a valid link the user can set a complexity-compliant new password and the old one stops working.

input.title: Password Reset
input.description: A user requests a password reset by entering their email. A time-limited, single-use reset link is emailed. Using the link, the user sets a new password (with confirmation) that must meet complexity rules. The old password is then invalid.
input.businessFlow: User requests reset → email with token link → opens link → sets new password → confirms → logs in with new password
input.acceptanceCriteria: Given a registered email, when a reset is requested, then a single-use, time-limited link is emailed without revealing whether the account exists; using a valid link the user can set a complexity-compliant new password and the old one stops working.

obligations: Successfully Create Reset with valid data
Reject malformed Email
Reject a too-weak Password
Enforce maximum Email length (254)
Enforce maximum Password length
Enforce minimum Password length
Neutralize SQL-like input in free-text fields
Neutralize template/command-like input in free-text fields
Neutralize script injection (XSS) in free-text fields
Preserve emoji / multibyte input in free-text fields
Preserve unicode/accented characters in free-text fields
Trim leading/trailing whitespace in free-text fields
